# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deployment Pipeline
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: 14
      - name: Install and build dependencies
        run: npm ci && npm run build
      - name: Cache Node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

  download_and_deploy:
    name: Download and Deploy Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          ref: ${{ needs.build.outputs.commitish }}
      - name: Use cache for Node modules from the build job
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ needs.build.outputs.npm_cache_key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifact
      - name: Extract downloaded artifact
        run: tar -xzf build-artifact/*.tar.gz
      - name: Run deployment scripts
        run: ./scripts/deploy.sh
